run_summary.summary: Big day in the pipeline! 🔥 Signed contract alert for BHG x Walmart — Adobe Sign confirmed all parties finished, so that one moves to Content. Gretta (People Inc.) is already ordering a 6-place table setting for filming. Whisker content got approved after a quick voiceover fix (Litter-Robot 5 → 5 Pro) — cleared to post early next week. Ollie's sent over campaign next steps with a hard April 29 draft deadline and key filming rules (Permission to Film Slip required at stores). New inbound from xTool offering their P3 laser machine (~$10K) as in-kind collab — created a card since the product value is significant, though no cash confirmed yet. HelloFresh is still deciding — Hana at Taskmetas says the brand is finalizing its creator list.

suggestions.message: Liz already asked Laura about a paid budget and xTool came back saying they're 'mainly in-kind.' There's still room to negotiate — worth replying with creative P3 content ideas AND circling back on whether any cash is possible for a $10K machine campaign. The tone from Laura is warm and collaborative, good moment to push.

Liz rescheduled a Tuesday content filming appointment with Alisa Gofman at Hawke Media (ccontrone@hawkemedia.com originally set this up). No new filming date was confirmed in the email — worth locking in a replacement date so you don't lose momentum on that deal.

deals.next_action: Reply to Laura with creative content ideas for the P3 laser machine; ask again about any paid component
deals.notes:
[Apr 16]: Laura (xTool) replied — offering P3 laser machine (~$10K value) as in-kind/gifted collab. Said they are 'currently mainly working on an in-kind collaboration basis (machine exchange).' No cash budget confirmed. Wants to hear Liz's creative vision for the P3 first and build from there. GIFTED/IN-KIND ONLY (for now) — team to decide if worth pursuing.
[Apr 15]: xTool inbound — Laura from xTool (gengchunhong@makeblock.com) reached out about 80W CO2 Laser collab. Liz responded expressing interest, cc'd Kenny, asked about deliverables, usage rights, and paid budget availability.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15-16: xTool inbound re: laser collab — offered P3 machine (~$10K gifted). Liz responded, xTool countered with in-kind only. Created deal card.

deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Content approved by Cheyenne (Whisker) after quick voiceover fix — original said 'Litter-Robot 5' instead of 'Litter-Robot 5 Pro.' Liz re-recorded, Cheyenne confirmed it's fine and cleared posting for early next week. Content link submitted via Google Drive.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Content approved with fix (Litter-Robot 5 Pro voiceover) — moved to Scheduled, clear to post week of Apr 20

deals.next_action: Film BHG x Walmart content when products arrive
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Contract #88191 (Influencer Services License Agreement – Brand Licensing) fully executed via Adobe Sign — all parties signed: Liz Hartmann, People Inc. (Eileen Mchugh, emchugh@people.inc), Dotdash Meredith (Patrick Cremens, patrick.cremens@dotdashmdp.com). Gretta Hegland (People Inc.) ordering 6-place table setting for content filming and shipping to Batavia IL address.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: BHG x Walmart contract signed by all parties (Adobe Sign). Products ordered for filming. Moved Contract → Content.

deals.next_action: Submit Ollie's content draft for review
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Ollie's campaign update — Frugal Finds 6-Month Program Group 2. Draft submission deadline: April 29. E-gift card en route to Liz. KEY RULES: (1) Must bring Permission to Film Slip when visiting any Ollie's store location for filming. (2) Some store locations are restricted — do NOT film there (list provided via link). (3) Do NOT say 'sale' in content — Ollie's prices are low every day, they don't have sales. All content must be submitted for approval before posting. Contact: Aviva (on behalf of Ollie's Bargain Outlet team).
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Ollie's sent campaign next steps — hard draft deadline Apr 29, filming rules (Permission to Film Slip required), e-gift card sent

deals.next_action: Wait for HelloFresh/Taskmetas to confirm creator selection
deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Hana Crnoja (Taskmetas / gotaskmetas.com) — 'The brand is still making its creator list. We'll reach out as soon as I have updates regarding opportunities for you.' Ball is on HelloFresh's side.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: HelloFresh still finalizing creator list — Hana will follow up when brand decides
